1. bhiṣajya Nom. P. ˚jyati (g. kaṇḍv-ādi) to heal, cure, possess healing power,  RV.  &c. &c.;
to be physician to any one (dat.),  Bālar. ;
to be a physician or remedy for i.e. to gain the mastery over anything (loc.),  ib.
